atoms.semantic_claim: Expose and compile the new `spc` submodule from `reth_node_ethereum` so the SPC verifier bridge becomes part of the crate surface.

destinations.evidence: The ported crate root exports `node`, `payload`, and `engine`, but no `pub mod spc;` entry exists. A repository-wide search also found no `crates/ethereum/node/src/spc.rs` in the port tree.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Add a compile-time import of `reth_node_ethereum::spc::SpcVerifierImpl`; the current port should fail to compile because the `spc` module is not declared.
atoms.notes: No exact, renamed, upstream, or dependency-hosted equivalent was found for this module wiring. Guideline remediation: accepted as intentionally absent because The user explicitly approved dropping old `reth_node_ethereum::spc` module-surface compatibility as an API detail, provided SPC/runtime verification behavior is preserved through the active chain path.
atoms.intentional_absence_rationale: The user explicitly approved dropping old `reth_node_ethereum::spc` module-surface compatibility as an API detail, provided SPC/runtime verification behavior is preserved through the active chain path.

atoms.semantic_claim: Re-export `SpcVerifierImpl` at the crate root so downstream code can import `reth_node_ethereum::SpcVerifierImpl` directly.

destinations.evidence: The ported crate root has no `pub use spc::SpcVerifierImpl;` or any other root-level export of `SpcVerifierImpl`.
A downstream consumer in the port workspace still imports and instantiates the crate-root `SpcVerifierImpl`, so the missing re-export is observable and behaviorally required.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Build `ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal`; the import `use reth_node_ethereum::{BasicBlockExecutorProvider, SpcVerifierImpl};` should fail until this re-export exists.
atoms.notes: No exact or renamed export was found in the port or upstream `v2.2.0`; this appears to be an unported public API addition. atoms.intentional_absence_rationale: The user explicitly approved dropping the old crate-root `SpcVerifierImpl` re-export as an API detail, provided SPC/runtime verification behavior is preserved through the active chain path.
